title: Delicate Garlicky Mediterranean Apricot Bowl
description: A crispy and flavorful Mediterranean dish featuring apricots, garlic, and a blend of herbs, served in a lacquerware bowl. This jain-friendly recipe is perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, salt, and pepper.
Add the diced apricots to the bowl and toss to coat with the garlic mixture.
Spread the apricot mixture on a baking sheet and roast in the oven for 15 minutes.
While the apricots are roasting, toast the pita bread slices and cube them into small pieces.
In a small bowl, mix together chopped parsley and mint.
To assemble the dish, place the roasted apricots in a lacquerware bowl, top with toasted pita bread cubes, and sprinkle with the parsley and mint mixture.
Garnish with additional parsley and mint if desired.
